title: Sati Sulochana
writer: Shri Sahitya Samrajya Nataka Mandali, R. Nagendra Rao, Bellave Narahari Sastry
plot: A Ramayana mythological told from the viewpoint of Sulochana, daughter-in-law of the villain Ravana. Her husband Indrajit, son of Ravan wounds Lakshman. Lakshamana is revived by the Sanjivani Mani brought by Hanuman. Indrajit is e...
